assertion.text: Tension: "Amyloid plaque burden is biologically important." vs "Amyloid plaque burden does not map cleanly onto severity of cognitive impairment and is limited as a sole proxy for disease state.". Why: The note holds biological importance and clinical-correlational weakness in the same breath, leaving unresolved how a biologically important feature can fail as a disease-state proxy.

provenance.title: Aβ plaque burden correlates poorly with cognitive decline.md

annotations.text: Reviewer Agent score: plausibility 0.70 · evidence 0.10 · scope 0.55 · duplicate-risk 0.60. Well-known amyloid tension, but proposal supplies zero evidence spans to anchor either side. Concerns: evidence_spans is empty; Tension is widely discussed — high duplicate risk in frontier; Both poles asserted without quoted source text.
annotations.author: reviewer:claude-proxy
